Package com.sportradar.unifiedodds.sdk.internal.caching.impl.ci

Class LotteryCiImpl

java.lang.Object
com.sportradar.unifiedodds.sdk.internal.caching.impl.ci.LotteryCiImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
CacheItem, LotteryCi, SportEventCi, ExportableCacheItem
public class LotteryCiImpl extends Object implements LotteryCi, ExportableCacheItem
Created on 18/01/2018. Lottery cache item
